content: Autonomous curiosity-driven agents (from Topic A) can be structured to prioritize updating their active memory with only high-uncertainty, information-dense experiences, creating a self-improving memory system that automatically outperforms 2024 SOTA static active learning agent memory pipelines. This creates a closed-loop system where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity directly curates the memory that improves its future active learning, eliminating the need for hand-designed sampling heuristics.
